hero_desc: From junior academies to competitive adult leagues — Los Cab offers a complete tennis experience for every age and level.
programs_subtitle: Whether you're picking up a racquet for the first time or training competitively, our expert coaches have a program for you.

programs.title: Junior Tennis Academy
programs.text: A structured development pathway for young players. Age-appropriate training covering technique, match play, sportsmanship, and competitive tournament preparation.

programs.title: After School Academy
programs.text: Afternoon programs that blend tennis instruction with fun activity after a school day. Designed to keep kids active, engaged, and developing their game.

programs.title: Adult Beginner & Intermediate
programs.text: New to tennis or want to build a stronger foundation? Group clinics and private lessons are available for adult beginners through intermediate players.

programs.title: Competitive Leagues & Drilling
programs.text: Year-round league play, round-robins, and advanced drilling clinics for competitive adults. Challenge your game and meet other serious players.

programs.title: Private Lessons
programs.text: One-on-one sessions with our certified teaching professionals. Personalized attention accelerates improvement at any age or level.

programs.title: Open Court Play
programs.text: Members can reserve courts online and enjoy open play throughout the day and evening. 17 courts mean you'll almost always find availability.

courts_subtitle: Our tennis facility features premium court surfaces, lighting for evening play, and a welcoming atmosphere for players of every level.

courts_features.title: 17 Total Courts
courts_features.desc: Multiple court surfaces with excellent drainage and maintenance, ensuring great play conditions year-round.

courts_features.title: Night Lighting
courts_features.desc: Illuminated courts mean you can play before work, after work, or on weekends after sunset.

courts_features.title: Pro Shop
courts_features.desc: On-site pro shop for racquet stringing, equipment, and accessories.

courts_features.title: Cabana Access
courts_features.desc: Private courtyard cabanas available to tennis members for a premium relaxation after play.

membership_details: $500 Initiation Fee · Includes all Pickleball & Sports benefits
membership_text: Full access to all 17 tennis courts, junior academies, adult programs, and every other club amenity.
cta_text: Join Los Cab today and access 17 premier tennis courts plus all club amenities.
